'''shapupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khakan|khakan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khakan|khakan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shapupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæpipith|shæpipith]] || [[word:shæpipij|shæpipij]] || [[word:shæpipish|shæpipish]] || [[word:shæpipi|shæpipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapupuputh|shapupuputh]] || [[word:shapupupuj|shapupupuj]] || [[word:shapupupush|shapupupush]] || [[word:shapupupu|shapupupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapuputh|shapuputh]] || [[word:shapupuj|shapupuj]] || [[word:shapupush|shapupush]] || [[word:shapupu|shapupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapufputh|shapufputh]] || [[word:shapufpuj|shapufpuj]] || [[word:shapufpush|shapufpush]] || [[word:shapufpuf|shapufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shapuputhu|shapuputhu]] || [[word:shapupuju|shapupuju]] || [[word:shapupushu|shapupushu]] || [[word:shapupuku|shapupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shapuputh|shapuputh]] || [[word:shapupuj|shapupuj]] || [[word:shapupush|shapupush]] || [[word:shapupu|shapupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shapuputhul|shapuputhul]] || [[word:shapupujul|shapupujul]] || [[word:shapupushul|shapupushul]] || [[word:shapupukul|shapupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shapuputhuthu|shapuputhuthu]] || [[word:shapupujuju|shapupujuju]] || [[word:shapupushushu|shapupushushu]] || [[word:shapupuku|shapupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shapuputhun|shapuputhun]] || [[word:shapupujun|shapupujun]] || [[word:shapupushun|shapupushun]] || [[word:shapupukun|shapupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shapuputhuoro|shapuputhuoro]] || [[word:shapupujuoro|shapupujuoro]] || [[word:shapupushuoro|shapupushuoro]] || [[word:shapupukuoro|shapupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
